chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1467 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For order on MA No.8264/2023. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2023 and it came up in Court lastly on 01.02.2024 when none was present on behalf of the petitioner, as such, in the interest of justice the matter was adjourned. Thereafter this petition is pending without any progress. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
